{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR / Admin Officer",
  "description": "Femaus Consults - We are a dynamic brand dedicated to driving excellence across diverse sectors. We specialize in capacity building, recruitment tailored to elevate businesses and organizations.


We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:
&nbsp;Job Position: HR / Admin Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time



Key Responsibilities
Human Resources:


	Coordinate end-to-end recruitment and onboarding processes.
	Maintain and update employee records and HR documentation.
	Support performance management, employee engagement, and staff development initiatives.
	Prepare employment contracts, confirmation letters, disciplinary letters, and other HR correspondence.
	Monitor employee attendance, leave records, and other HR metrics.
	Ensure compliance with labor laws, company policies, and industry regulations.
	Assist in implementing HR policies, procedures, and best practices.
	Coordinate staff training and development program&rsquo;s.


Administration:


	Oversee daily administrative and office operations.
	Manage office supplies, vendors, and facility maintenance.
	Coordinate meetings, appointments, travel arrangements, and company events.
	Maintain company records, filing systems, and confidential documentation.
	Prepare reports, memos, and official correspondence.
	Liaise with government agencies, regulatory bodies, and external service providers when required.
	Ensure smooth coordination between departments and provide administrative support to management.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Industrial Relations, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of 3 years&#39; proven HR and Administrative experience in the Oil &amp; Gas industry (Mandatory).
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian Labor Law and HR best practices.
	Experience handling recruitment, employee relations, and office administration.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong organizational, planning, and multitasking abilities.
	High level of integrity, discretion, and professionalism.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook).
	Ability to work independently and within a team in a fast-paced environment.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Professional HR certification (CIPM, SHRM, HRCI, or equivalent) will be an added advantage.
	Experience working with HRIS or other HR management systems.
	Strong problem-solving and interpersonal skills.




What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits.
	Career growth and professional development opportunities.
	A collaborative and professional work environment.
	Opportunity to contribute to a dynamic and growing organization.




Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter to: recruitment@femausconsults.ng using &quot;HR/Admin Officer&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Only qualified candidates who meet the stated requirements, particularly the mandatory Oil &amp; Gas industry experience, should apply
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

HR / Admin Officer Job at Femaus Consults




        
    

        
        
     

            
    

Femaus Consults - We are a dynamic brand dedicated to driving excellence across diverse sectors. We specialize in capacity building, recruitment tailored to elevate businesses and organizations.


We are recruiting to fill the position below:
 Job Position: HR / Admin Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time



Key Responsibilities
Human Resources:


	Coordinate end-to-end recruitment and onboarding processes.
	Maintain and update employee records and HR documentation.
	Support performance management, employee engagement, and staff development initiatives.
	Prepare employment contracts, confirmation letters, disciplinary letters, and other HR correspondence.
	Monitor employee attendance, leave records, and other HR metrics.
	Ensure compliance with labor laws, company policies, and industry regulations.
	Assist in implementing HR policies, procedures, and best practices.
	Coordinate staff training and development program’s.


Administration:


	Oversee daily administrative and office operations.
	Manage office supplies, vendors, and facility maintenance.
	Coordinate meetings, appointments, travel arrangements, and company events.
	Maintain company records, filing systems, and confidential documentation.
	Prepare reports, memos, and official correspondence.
	Liaise with government agencies, regulatory bodies, and external service providers when required.
	Ensure smooth coordination between departments and provide administrative support to management.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Industrial Relations, or a related discipline.
	Minimum of 3 years' proven HR and Administrative experience in the Oil & Gas industry (Mandatory).
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian Labor Law and HR best practices.
	Experience handling recruitment, employee relations, and office administration.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Strong organizational, planning, and multitasking abilities.
	High level of integrity, discretion, and professionalism.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook).
	Ability to work independently and within a team in a fast-paced environment.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Professional HR certification (CIPM, SHRM, HRCI, or equivalent) will be an added advantage.
	Experience working with HRIS or other HR management systems.
	Strong problem-solving and interpersonal skills.




What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits.
	Career growth and professional development opportunities.
	A collaborative and professional work environment.
	Opportunity to contribute to a dynamic and growing organization.




Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter to: [email protected] using "HR/Admin Officer” as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Only qualified candidates who meet the stated requirements, particularly the mandatory Oil & Gas industry experience, should apply
	Only shortlisted candidates will be    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "Zipline - Do you want to change the world? Zipline uses drones to deliver critical and life-saving medicine to thousands of hospitals serving millions of people in multiple countries. Our mission is to provide every human on Earth with instant access to vital medical supplies. Join Zipline and help us make this a reality for billions of people.

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Lagos

About You and The Role


	Zipline is seeking a highly creative and motivated Social Media Manager to join our dynamic marketing and communications team.
	As a Social Media Manager at Zipline, you will play a key role in developing and executing social media strategies and content across all of our channels in Rwanda, Pan-Africa and globally, including TikTok, X, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, and LinkedIn.
	Your primary goal will be to create compelling content that engages our local and global audiences and showcases Zipline&rsquo;s impact in exciting and innovative ways.


What You&#39;ll Do


	Create entertaining, iconic content for Zipline&rsquo;s social media that people want to share and is optimized for each platform&#39;s unique audience and algorithm.
	Work on crafting fun, educational content that helps further our mission to build the world&rsquo;s first logistics system that serves all people equally.
	Conceptualize, script, produce, and shoot short-form video content for our social channels in Rwanda and Pan-Africa, including TikTok, X, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, and LinkedIn.
	Work on large-scale content campaigns ranging from content with creators, to scripted content with our animated characters.
	Work cross-functionally to help promote different product features, launches and brand initiatives.
	Evolve our short-form video strategy with an eye towards quantitative analysis: run lots of content experiments and iterate on the ones that&nbsp;work.
	Monitor social media trends, tools, and applications and apply knowledge to continuously improve strategies.
	Analyze social media insights and performance metrics to optimize content and strategy.
	Manage and maintain the organization&rsquo;s social media profiles and presence, including scheduling posts and responding to followers.


What You&#39;ll Bring


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Communications, or related fields (preferred).
	3+ years of work experience in social media marketing, specifically with video content and video-first social media channels.
	Video portfolio that includes long and short format content with strong engagement on TikTok, X, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, and/or&nbsp; LinkedIn.
	Expertise in including TikTok, X, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, and LinkedIn with a deep understanding of each platform&#39;s best practices, algorithms, and community trends.
	Video production experience &ndash; you&rsquo;re intimately familiar with in-app creator tools across social platforms and know your way around video editing software like Adobe Premiere
	In-tune with social trends, even before they hit; ability to respond ASAP to trends/memes to capitalize on those opportunities
	Strong copywriting and editing skills with an eye for detail.
	Ability to interpret analytics and translate data into actionable insights.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Creative thinker and problem-solver.

Social Media Manager Job at Zipline




        
    

        
        Zipline - Do you want to change the world? Zipline uses drones to deliver critical and life-saving medicine to thousands of hospitals serving millions of people in multiple countries. Our mission is to provide every human on Earth with instant access to vital medical supplies. Join Zipline and help us make this a reality for billions of people.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Lagos

About You and The Role
     

            
    




	Zipline is seeking a highly creative and motivated Social Media Manager to join our dynamic marketing and communications team.
	As a Social Media Manager at Zipline, you will play a key role in developing and executing social media strategies and content across all of our channels in Rwanda, Pan-Africa and globally, including TikTok, X, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, and LinkedIn.
	Your primary goal will be to create compelling content that engages our local and global audiences and showcases Zipline’s impact in exciting and innovative ways.


What You'll Do


	Create entertaining, iconic content for Zipline’s social media that people want to share and is optimized for each platform's unique audience and algorithm.
	Work on crafting fun, educational content that helps further our mission to build the world’s first logistics system that serves all people equally.
	Conceptualize, script, produce, and shoot short-form video content for our social channels in Rwanda and Pan-Africa, including TikTok, X, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, and LinkedIn.
	Work on large-scale content campaigns ranging from content with creators, to scripted content with our animated characters.
	Work cross-functionally to help promote different product features, launches and brand initiatives.
	Evolve our short-form video strategy with an eye towards quantitative analysis: run lots of content experiments and iterate on the ones that work.
	Monitor social media trends, tools, and applications and apply knowledge to continuously improve strategies.
	Analyze social media insights and performance metrics to optimize content and strategy.
	Manage and maintain the organization’s social media profiles and presence, including scheduling posts and responding to followers.


What You'll Bring


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Communications, or related fields (preferred).
	3+ years of work experience in social media marketing, specifically with video content and video-first social media channels.
	Video portfolio that includes long and short format content with strong engagement on TikTok, X, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, and/or  LinkedIn.
	Expertise in including TikTok, X, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, and LinkedIn with a deep understanding of each platform's best practices, algorithms, and community trends.
	Video production experience – you’re intimately familiar with in-app creator tools across social platforms and know your way around video editing software like Adobe Premiere
	In-tune with social trends, even before they hit; ability to respond ASAP to trends/memes to capitalize on those opportunities
	Strong copywriting and editing skills with an eye for detail.
	Ability to interpret analytics and translate data into actionable insights.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Creative thinker and problem-solver.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Manager",
  "description": "ZBOM is a furniture and fittings company. We providecustomized design and services for one-stop home solution. It provides comprehensive home solutions from kitchens to entire homes for millions of families worldwide.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Manager

Job Location: Area 11, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Sales Manager is responsible for driving sustainable revenue growth, leading the sales function, and expanding ZBOM&rsquo;s market presence across residential, commercial, and corporate segments.
	This role combines strategic sales leadership, key account management, and showroom oversight, with a strong focus on building long-term relationships with architects, developers, contractors, and high-value clients.
	The role holder will develop and execute sales strategies, manage the sales pipeline, mentor sales team members, and collaborate cross-functionally to ensure an exceptional customer experience from lead generation to project delivery.


Key Responsibilities:
Sales Leadership &amp; Strategy:


	Develop and implement comprehensive sales strategies to achieve revenue, growth, and market penetration targets.
	Set, monitor, and report on monthly, quarterly, and annual sales KPIs, including pipeline value, conversion rates, and average deal size.
	Lead, coach, and motivate the sales team to consistently meet or exceed targets.
	Oversee showroom sales operations, ensuring high standards of customer engagement and brand representation.


Business Development &amp; Key Accounts :


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities with architects, interior designers, property developers, contractors, and corporate clients.
	Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with key accounts and strategic partners.
	Lead negotiations for high-value and complex sales deals, ensuring profitable and sustainable agreements.
	Represent the company at industry events, trade fairs, and networking forums to drive brand visibility and partnerships.


Customer Experience &amp; Sales Execution :


	Personally manage high-value or strategic client engagements, from needs assessment through proposal, closing, and post-sale support.
	Oversee the preparation of compelling sales proposals, quotations, and project timelines.
	Ensure seamless coordination with design, production, and installation teams to deliver projects on time and to specification.
	Champion customer satisfaction, retention, and referral generation.


Sales Operations &amp; Reporting :


	Ensure accurate and up-to-date sales data, forecasts, and pipeline management within the CRM system.
	Analyze sales performance trends and market insights to inform decision-making and strategy adjustments.
	Provide regular sales reports and insights to senior management.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in Business Analysis, Data Analysis, Business Intelligence, Management reporting, or a related field.
	Experience selling modular or flat-pack furniture solutions.
	Existing relationships with architects, interior designers, or property developers.
	Familiarity with 3D configuration tools or presentation software.
	Knowledge of Nigeria&rsquo;s real estate and construction market dynamics.
	Strong closing skills and ability to negotiate win-win agreements.
	Empathetic approach to understanding client needs and delivering tailored solutions.
	Quickly learn technical specifications and communicate benefits clearly.
	Confident public speaking and ability to conduct compelling demos.
	Establishes long-term client partnerships and referral networks.
	Drives personal performance and thrives in a target-driven environment.
	Works seamlessly with cross-functional teams to ensure end-to-end customer satisfaction.
	Demonstrated track record of consistently meeting or exceeding sales targets.
	Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to build trust quickly.
	Proficiency in using CRM software and Microsoft Office suite.
	Ability to travel locally for client visits and industry events.
	Valid driver&rsquo;s license and clean driving record.
	Based in the showroom with a hybrid mix of in-store customer engagement and off-site client visits.
	Fast-paced retail atmosphere with peak periods during weekends and promotional events.
	Occasional participation in trade fairs, industry conferences, and community shows.
	Requires standing for extended periods, product demonstrations, and carrying sample materials (up to 10kg).
	High proficiency with Google Suite, Microsoft Office, and modern collaboration tools (Slack, ClickUp, Asana).
	Strong commercial acumen with an understanding of multi-sector business dynamics (Energy, Real Estate, Hospitality, Retail).
	Excellent research skills with an innate curiosity for current affairs and global markets.


Benefits
Salary is negotiable and will be based on qualifications, experience, and demonstrated competencies.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward CV to vestateshrcompliance@gmail.com using &ldquo;Sales Manager &rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Sales Manager Job at ZBOM




        
    

        
        ZBOM is a furniture and fittings company. We providecustomized design and services for one-stop home solution. It provides comprehensive home solutions from kitchens to entire homes for millions of families worldwide.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Manager

Job Location: Area 11, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	The Sales Manager is responsible for driving sustainable revenue growth, leading the sales function, and expanding ZBOM’s market presence across residential, commercial, and corporate segments.
	This role combines strategic sales leadership, key account management, and showroom oversight, with a strong focus on building long-term relationships with architects, developers, contractors, and high-value clients.
	The role holder will develop and execute sales strategies, manage the sales pipeline, mentor sales team members, and collaborate cross-functionally to ensure an exceptional customer experience from lead generation to project delivery.


Key Responsibilities:
Sales Leadership & Strategy:


	Develop and implement comprehensive sales strategies to achieve revenue, growth, and market penetration targets.
	Set, monitor, and report on monthly, quarterly, and annual sales KPIs, including pipeline value, conversion rates, and average deal size.
	Lead, coach, and motivate the sales team to consistently meet or exceed targets.
	Oversee showroom sales operations, ensuring high standards of customer engagement and brand representation.


Business Development & Key Accounts :


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities with architects, interior designers, property developers, contractors, and corporate clients.
	Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with key accounts and strategic partners.
	Lead negotiations for high-value and complex sales deals, ensuring profitable and sustainable agreements.
	Represent the company at industry events, trade fairs, and networking forums to drive brand visibility and partnerships.


Customer Experience & Sales Execution :


	Personally manage high-value or strategic client engagements, from needs assessment through proposal, closing, and post-sale support.
	Oversee the preparation of compelling sales proposals, quotations, and project timelines.
	Ensure seamless coordination with design, production, and installation teams to deliver projects on time and to specification.
	Champion customer satisfaction, retention, and referral generation.


Sales Operations & Reporting :


	Ensure accurate and up-to-date sales data, forecasts, and pipeline management within the CRM system.
	Analyze sales performance trends and market insights to inform decision-making and strategy adjustments.
	Provide regular sales reports and insights to senior management.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in Business Analysis, Data Analysis, Business Intelligence, Management reporting, or a related field.
	Experience selling modular or flat-pack furniture solutions.
	Existing relationships with architects, interior designers, or property developers.
	Familiarity with 3D configuration tools or presentation software.
	Knowledge of Nigeria’s real estate and construction market dynamics.
	Strong closing skills and ability to negotiate win-win agreements.
	Empathetic approach to understanding client needs and delivering tailored solutions.
	Quickly learn technical specifications and communicate benefits clearly.
	Confident public speaking and ability to conduct compelling demos.
	Establishes long-term client partnerships and referral networks.
	Drives personal performance and thrives in a target-driven environment.
	Works seamlessly with cross-functional teams to ensure end-to-end customer satisfaction.
	Demonstrated track record of consistently meeting or exceeding sales targets.
	Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to build trust quickly.
	Proficiency in using CRM software and Microsoft Office suite.
	Ability to travel locally for client visits and industry events.
	Valid driver’s license and clean driving record.
	Based in the showroom with a hybrid mix of in-store customer engagement and off-site client visits.
	Fast-paced retail atmosphere with peak periods during weekends and promotional events.
	Occasional participation in trade fairs, industry conferences, and community shows.
	Requires standing for extended periods, product demonstrations, and carrying sample materials (up to 10kg).
	High proficiency with Google Suite, Microsoft Office, and modern collaboration tools (Slack, ClickUp, Asana).
	Strong commercial acumen with an understanding of multi-sector business dynamics (Energy, Real Estate, Hospitality, Retail).
	Excellent research skills with an innate curiosity for current affairs and global markets.


Benefits
Salary is negotiable and will be based on qualifications, experience, and demonstrated competencies.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward CV to [email protected] using “Sales Manager ” as the subject of the email.
